label: Full Member States
deltaNote: Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran, UAE joined Jan 2024; Indonesia joined Jan 2025

label: Share of World GDP (PPP)
contestNote: PPP-adjusted figure favored by BRICS; G7 holds ~43% by nominal exchange rates — methodology choice significantly shifts perception of bloc dominance

label: NDB Total Approved Financing
deltaNote: First loans approved April 2016; $811M in green energy; Russia lending suspended Dec 2022

label: Share of Global Oil Production
contestNote: Includes Russia, Iran, UAE, and Brazil; Saudi Arabia's unconfirmed membership status affects the figure significantly if included

label: BRICS Partner Nations
deltaNote: 13 admitted at Kazan 2024; Indonesia upgraded to full member Jan 2025, reducing partner count to 12

label: Intra-BRICS Trade (Annual)
contestNote: China-Russia energy trade volumes disputed due to sanctions opacity; aggregate figures from member-state customs vary by 10–15%

label: USD Share of Global FX Reserves
contestNote: Down from 72% in 1999; BRICS de-dollarization framing claims faster decline, but yuan remains below 3% of global reserves — structural shift is slow
